title: I do absolutely zero coding to backtest any strategy i like.
author: shazuwuu
selftext: Exactly. I do know a bit of Python but i've stoped coding completely. Found this amazing tool to literally prompt in plain english to describe my strategy and it does wonders. It's called [finstocks.ai](http://finstocks.ai/) (i'm not promoting anything i genuinely like this so i'm sharing it here). I mean you guys might not be in favour of these AI tools which might even hallucinate or break during the flow but i've been using this for over a month and i have zero complain. it has other features like mock mode for paper trading or just type "invest 15 k" and then everything is handled by it you don't even need to manually interfere. Almost everything required for trading is just a single prompt away like RSI values, candles, technical indicators, fundamentals, news etc etc. Lemme know what do you guys feel about this (maybe try paper trading using the mock mode and then lemme know).

comments.author: cherry-pick-crew
comments.body:
If you want to automate trading specially event based 
Check out [useagentbase.dev](https://useagentbase.dev)

comments.author: -Cubie-
comments.body: This is like your 20th post on this "site you just found", come on man. Get outta here with your ads.
